intro: A curated set of 20 String problems frequently useful for Google interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many String problems should I do for Google?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 15 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the String topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best String Questions for Google | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top String coding interview questions for Google. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
